run_summary.summary: Four meaningful updates today. SOJOS is the biggest move — Ruby from SOJOS Vision approved Liz's revised content AND requested bank payment info to arrange payment; Kenny replied with bank details and said he'd notify Ruby when the post goes live. Time to schedule and post. Flexsteel has an urgent issue that was missed in this morning's scan: Kenny forgot to apply Liz to the Flexsteel/Steinhafels campaign after their visit, and had to ask Ian (Popfly) to reopen the application window — status unknown, needs follow-up ASAP. From Mariah's check-in, two deals missed earlier: Aleve's $12k content is under brand approval, and JLab May campaign is 'ready for content.' Also noting Aquara payment expected soon.

suggestions.message: Kenny forgot to apply Liz to the Flexsteel/Steinhafels campaign after their store visit Apr 23. Ian had already reopened the application window once — Kenny asked him to do it again on Apr 24. Did Ian respond? This needs to be resolved ASAP before the window closes again.

SOJOS approved Liz's revised content and asked 'let us know when you will upload!' — Kenny sent payment bank info. Content is cleared, just needs to be posted. Notify Ruby at marketing202@sojosvision.com once it goes live.
JLab May campaign is 'ready for content' per Mariah's Apr 24 check-in. $2,000 deal — Liz should start filming.

deals.next_action: Post SOJOS content and notify Ruby when live
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Ruby approved revised content — replied 'Thanks so much! Let us know when you will upload!' and requested Liz's bank payment info to arrange payment. Kenny sent bank details and confirmed he'll notify Ruby when the post goes live. Content is ready to post.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: SOJOS approved revised content + requested bank payment info — Kenny sent bank details. Moving Approval → Scheduled.

deals.next_action: Confirm Ian reopened Flexsteel campaign application — apply immediately if open
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: URGENT — Kenny forgot to apply Liz to the Flexsteel campaign after the Steinhafels visit (got home, kids activities, etc.). Ian had reopened the application window on Apr 23, but Kenny missed it. Kenny emailed Ian on Apr 24 to ask if he can reopen it again. Waiting on Ian's response. Risk: campaign window may close again.
